title: wedelia mollis
intro: Wedelia mollis, also known as the Mexican daisy or creeping zinnia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Wedelia mollis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also valued for its ornamental and edible flower petals.
